Sage Bot Item Code: CB3


Other locations the gear can be found
Siege Saboteur Chest
Laced Gunslinger Crossbow

When attacking, has a [30%-33%] chance of dealing [145%-165%] damage in 2 seconds.
When the unit's health is lower than 50%, their dodge and crit are increased by 70%.

After a critical shot, the unit gains a shield that blocks any 4 attacks. The shield lasts for up to 3 sec. The ability triggers only once per 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
